description: JSON protocol serializer: X-Amz-Target header, JSON body from input value + shape definitions
JSON protocol response parser: JSON body -> serde_json::Value using shape definitions
JSON protocol error parsing: __type and message fields from JSON error response
notes: Session 2: 8 tests, handles # namespace prefix and both message/Message

description: REST-JSON protocol serializer: URI templates, headers, querystring, JSON body for remaining members
notes: Session 2: 11 tests, URI templates, greedy labels, headers, querystring, mixed locations

description: REST-JSON protocol response parser: headers + JSON body -> serde_json::Value
notes: Session 2: 13 tests, body+headers+statusCode, streaming payload, error parsing

description: REST-XML protocol serializer: URI templates, headers, querystring, XML body for remaining members
notes: Session 2: 11 tests, URI templates, XML body, payload, flattened lists, maps

description: REST-XML protocol response parser: headers + XML body -> serde_json::Value using shape definitions
notes: Session 2: 14 tests, S3 ListBuckets format, headers, payload, flattened lists, error parsing

description: EC2 query protocol variant: same as query but with different error XML format (<Response><Errors><Error>...)
notes: Session 2: 4 tests, parse_ec2_error in query.rs, dispatch_ec2_protocol in driver

description: Protocol dispatch in driver: select serializer/parser based on metadata.protocol (query, json, rest-json, rest-xml, ec2)
notes: Session 2: All 5 protocols dispatched in driver.rs, s3api->s3 alias mapping

description: E2E: raws dynamodb list-tables --region us-east-1 works with JSON protocol against real AWS
E2E: raws s3api list-buckets works with REST-XML protocol against real AWS
notes: Session 2: Returns Buckets array with 2 buckets from real AWS, s3api alias maps to s3 model

description: E2E: raws lambda list-functions --region us-east-1 works with REST-JSON protocol against real AWS
